    1. Constant Field Values
      1. edu.ieselgrao.*

    Constant Field Values

    edu.ieselgrao.*

    • edu.ieselgrao.javadoc.UniverseException
      Modifier and Type
      Constant Field
      Value
      public static final String
      INVALID_COMPOSITION
      "[ERROR] Composition cannot be null or empty"
      public static final String
      INVALID_DENSITY
      "[ERROR] Density cannot be negative"
      public static final String
      INVALID_GRAVITY
      "[ERROR] Gravity cannot be negative or zero"
      public static final String
      INVALID_LAST_ALBEDO_MEASUREMENT
      "[ERROR] Last albedo measurement cannot be null or in the future"
      public static final String
      INVALID_LAST_OBSERVATION
      "[ERROR] Last observation cannot be null or in the future"
      public static final String
      INVALID_LAST_PLANET_ADDED
      "[ERROR] Last planet date added cannot be in the future"
      public static final String
      INVALID_MASS
      "[ERROR] Mass cannot be less than 10e23 kg"
      public static final String
      INVALID_MAX_PLANETS
      "[ERROR] Maximum number of planets reached"
      public static final String
      INVALID_NUMBER_OF_MOONS
      "[ERROR] Number of moons cannot be negative"
      public static final String
      INVALID_NUMBER_OF_STARS
      "[ERROR] Number of stars cannot be less than 1"
      public static final String
      INVALID_PLANET_NAME
      "[ERROR] Name cannot be null or empty"
      public static final String
      INVALID_PLANET_RADIUS
      "[ERROR] Radius cannot be less than 500 km"
      public static final String
      INVALID_PLANET_TYPE
      "[ERROR] Invalid planet type"
      public static final String
      INVALID_PRESSURE
      "[ERROR] Pressure cannot be negative"
      public static final String
      INVALID_REGISTRATION_DATE
      "[ERROR] Registration date cannot be null or in the future"
      public static final String
      INVALID_SOLAR_SYSTEM_NAME
      "[ERROR] Name cannot be null, contain only spaces or have less than 3 characters"
      public static final String
      INVALID_SOLAR_SYSTEM_RADIUS
      "[ERROR] Radius cannot be less or equal to 0"
      public static final String
      PLANET_ALREADY_EXISTS
      "[ERROR] This planet already exists"
      public static final String
      PLANET_NOT_FOUND
      "[ERROR] This planet does not exist"
      public static final String
      PLANET_NULL
      "[ERROR] Planet cannot be null"
